title: ADR: Auth Provider Decoupling Strategy
purpose: Document the decision to decouple VINTRACK from local Supabase stack, using hosted Supabase Auth + local PostgreSQL + local Redis. Establish the IdentityProvider port pattern.
architectural_constraints: Auth provider is a commodity service, not domain model
Identity domain owns user lifecycle, not auth provider
JWT verification is infrastructure concern, hidden behind port
All auth provider SDK imports isolated to infrastructure/auth/

deliverables.description: Architecture Decision Record for auth decoupling
Identity domain README with auth provider boundary

acceptance_criteria: ADR documents context, decision, consequences, and migration path
Identity domain README explains auth provider port
Code review checklist updated to flag Supabase SDK imports outside infrastructure
